_fixture_meta.purpose: REAL-DATA test fixture. Modeled on the actual Ashley Russ CCHCS RFQ — Solicitation 10846581 — Non-Cloud RFQ Packet 12.3.25 — for 30 EA Resvent iBreeze 20A-W CPAP machines to CCWF Chowchilla. The RFQ was due 5/15/2026 at 4:00 PM PT; the bid window closed 3 hours before this fixture was captured, so the operational risk is zero — Reytech cannot ship this anymore and CCHCS will resolicit if needed. The data SHAPE is real (line item, qty, model, ship-to, solicitation #, buyer email); the cost and unit_price are reasonable estimates standing in for Mike's actual vendor quote (Resvent iBreeze 20A-W has online retail floor $299.99 — see WebSearch results 5/15). When Mike runs the next CCHCS bid, this fixture pattern is the canonical 'no-bid test account' the Spine roadmap calls for.
